fields.heading: Build Something Amazing
fields.subheading: A headless CMS curated for humans, powered by intelligence. Experience a layout that breathes and scales with your ambition.

fields.heading: Everything you need, nothing you don't.
fields.subheading: Engineered for speed, curated for aesthetic precision. The only CMS that feels like high-end furniture.

features.title: Instant Edge API
features.description: Deliver content globally in milliseconds with our native edge-first infrastructure.

features.title: Visual Schema
features.description: Architect complex data models with an interface that feels like a design tool.

features.title: AI Curation
features.description: Automated tagging, translation, and SEO optimization built into the workflow.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.description: SSO, audit logs, and granular permissions for teams of all sizes.

features.title: Multi-tenant Flow
features.description: Manage hundreds of projects from a single unified dashboard without the clutter.

features.title: Insight Engine
features.description: Real-time content performance metrics directly within your editor.

fields.heading: Crafted for the modern web stack
fields.body:
Connect to Next.js, Remix, Astro, or any framework with our type-safe SDKs. We don't just deliver JSON; we deliver peace of mind.

  • Real-time collaboration
  • Version branching

fields.heading: Editorial experience redefined
fields.body:
Give your content creators a home they actually enjoy using. Minimalist, distraction-free, and logically structured.

The fastest editor I've ever used. It feels like writing in a premium journal rather than a database.

fields.heading: Loved by the world's most creative teams.

testimonials.quote: VibeCMS changed how we ship. The edge performance is unparalleled.
The aesthetic of the dashboard alone improved our team's morale.
Finally, a headless CMS that doesn't feel like a spreadsheet.

items.question: How is VibeCMS different from Contentful or Sanity?
items.answer: VibeCMS is built with a focus on editorial aesthetic and edge-native performance. While others provide generic blocks, we provide curated intelligence that helps you model data faster and more reliably.

items.question: Do you offer a free plan for developers?
items.answer: Yes! Our Spark plan is free forever for personal projects and includes up to 5,000 records and 10GB of bandwidth.

items.question: Is VibeCMS SOC2 compliant?
items.answer: We are fully SOC2 Type II and GDPR compliant. Security is a first-class citizen in our architecture.

fields.heading: Ready to evolve your content?
fields.body: Join 10,000+ developers building the future of the luminous web.
